```{=html}
<div class="year-banner"><div class="portrait" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div><div class="year-num">2013</div><div class="year-meta">8,199 posts this year. Showing first 300.</div></div></div>
```


<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<div id="year-months" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12"], y: [814, 926, 871, 910, 768, 487, 697, 732, 674, 565, 380, 375],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#0A2540" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 30, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      height: 210, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("year-months", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>

Tariffs</span></div><div class="actions"><a onclick="window.trumpFilter.solo()">Show all</a><a onclick="window.trumpFilter.none()">Hide all</a><span class="muted">click a chip to solo &middot; shift-click to hide</span></div></div><div class="post-stream" id="stream-2013"><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 01, 2013  09:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Obama and the Democrats are laughing at the deal they just made...the Republicans got nothing!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286127330135506948" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286127330135506948" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 01, 2013  09:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I am a Republican...but the Republicans may be the worst negotiators in history!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286127952758964225" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286127952758964225" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 01, 2013  09:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;What is Mitch McConnell thinking?...make the big deal!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286128820422049792" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286128820422049792" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 01, 2013  09:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Maybe Boehner will stop this one sided deal in the House...I hope so!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286129753180762114" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286129753180762114" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  08:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;This is a terrible deal for the country and an embarrassment for Republicans!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286486041836265473" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286486041836265473" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  08:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Does any Republican have the ability to negotiate?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286486441092079617" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286486441092079617" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  10:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My @ foxandfriends interview from Monday discussing Obama‚Äôs tone</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286516096201269248" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286516096201269248" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  11:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The party of the year in Palm Beach was the New Year&#x27;s Eve celebration at the Mar-a-Lago Club--it was amazing. http://www.maralagoclub.com/&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286517602568790016" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286517602568790016" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  11:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Donald Trump praises @ LilJon and welcomes him back to All Star @ CelebApprentice&#x27; http://bit.ly/Xit0Ek via @ HipHopNews24x7&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286525276907790336" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286525276907790336" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  11:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;‚ÄúI always follow my own instincts</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286527813597679616" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286527813597679616" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  11:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulations to @ RobinRoberts on celebrating 100 days in her bone marrow transplant recovery. Robin is a special person.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286528544958455808" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286528544958455808" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  12:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;‚ÄúIf we get tough and make the hard choices</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286534968182714368" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286534968182714368" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  12:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Republicans must face reality &amp; create a strong &amp; positive immigration policy--if not they will continue to lose elections.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286539154005835776" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286539154005835776" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  12:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;. @ GOP‚Äôs election loss and failed negotiations will serve as a case study in how third parties come about.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286541392921120769" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286541392921120769" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  12:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Via @ HuffPostPol: ‚ÄúDonald Trump: &#x27;Republicans May Be The Worst Negotiators In History&#x27;‚Äùhttp://www.huffingtonpost.com/2013/01/01/donald-trump-republicans_n_2392960.html ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286542442193383426" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286542442193383426" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  13:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ SharonDepp Thanks--and Happy New Year to you.&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286548001818816512" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286548001818816512" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  13:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Medicare payments have become so unpredictable that record amount of doctors are now leaving http://onforb.es/XixSJD Bad for long term.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286551774553317377" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286551774553317377" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  13:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Obama&#x27;s deal raises taxes on 77% of national households. With Obama Care taxes kicking in now</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286552014480084994" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286552014480084994" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  13:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;...Remember--I told you so.&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286553271890497536" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286553271890497536" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  13:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Make sure you realize that this ‚Äòdeal‚Äô is only a stop gap measure.Obama will be looking to raise even more taxes in the coming negotiation..&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286553351993303040" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286553351993303040" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  13:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;This ‚Äòdeal‚Äô @ RNC voted for has $41 in tax increases for every $1 in spending cuts. It is pathetic. Obama is laughing at them.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286554233556316160" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286554233556316160" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  14:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congrats to @ GovernorCorbett--he&#x27;s right to be suing @ NCAA over the ridiculous deal made by the trustees of Penn Statehttp://reut.rs/XiuVJ6&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286563201070551041" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286563201070551041" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2013  14:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;New York City hosted over 52 million visitors in 2012. http://bit.ly/XizBi9 Record amount visited Trump Tower.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286565554196721665" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286565554196721665" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2013  10:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;‚ÄúDonald Trump on ‚Äòcliff‚Äô: ‚ÄòOther countries are eating our lunch‚Äô‚Äù http://bit.ly/UgKEY3 via @ BIZPACReview&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286869216869629952" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286869216869629952" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; You‚Äôre not only the commander in chief</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286912989322424320" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286912989322424320" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2013  13:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@jamesche85 Dopey</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286914039559368704" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286914039559368704" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2013  14:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Republicans look so weak and foolish‚Äîwhat the hell are they doing?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286930131841335297" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286930131841335297" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2013  14:21</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Do you notice that oil prices just went up big time?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286930389694550016" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286930389694550016" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2013  14:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;So Obama and Congress can waste billions in Iraq &amp; Afghanistan building roads &amp; schools but can‚Äôt get money to the NJ &amp; NY Sandy victims?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286930857380421633" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286930857380421633" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2013  14:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great to see Sec. Clinton leaving the hospital yesterday with @ ChelseaClinton and Pres. Clinton. Glad she is recuperating.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286934315156258816" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286934315156258816" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2013  15:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Republicans had all the cards but not the guts to make a great deal!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286942958589206528" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286942958589206528" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2013  15:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Trump Organization is going revolutionize Rio de Janeiro‚Äôs downtown port area with Trump Towers. Construction begins soon!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286944429275754497" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286944429275754497" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2013  15:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ MarkGhuneim Something used on occasion by many of the world&#x27;s greatest businessmen.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Jan 03, 2013  15:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I‚Äôll bet Obama now uses the amendment for the debt ceiling.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Jan 03, 2013  15:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Just shows that you can have all the cards and lose if you don‚Äôt know what you‚Äôre doing.&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_286952264122396672" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/286952264122396672" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2013  11:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ jacksback2009 Thanks Jack and Happy New Year.&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_287245694861987840" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/287245694861987840" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2013  12:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Wealth comes from big goals and sustained action toward those goals every day.&#x27; - Think Big&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_287269104430243840" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/287269104430243840" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2013  14:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Make sure you take some time to enjoy the weekend. Important for your mind and will help you be productive next week.&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_287299754516430848" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/287299754516430848" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2013  14:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;To all young entrepreneurs entering the business world - stay positive</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_287300030686179328" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/287300030686179328" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2013  14:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The 13th season of All Star @ CelebApprentice is unique. We really pushed the envelope here. Our great and loyal fans will love it.&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_287301544959950848" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/287301544959950848" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2013  11:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;‚ÄúDonald Trump hosts first-ever &#x27;Trump Invitational&#x27; at Mar-a-Lago‚Äù http://bit.ly/WofwAC via @ WPTV&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_288339377246048256" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/288339377246048256" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2013  13:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ ScarletR29 @ IvankaTrump @ DonaldJTrumpJr @ EricTrump Happy Birthday!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_288359961489190915" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/288359961489190915" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2013  13:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;. @ ArsenioOFFICIAL Thx for the good wishes--you are going to have a really big year!&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_288361144832385024" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/288361144832385024" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2013  13:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;. @ ewanshearer Happy Birthday&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_288362226694377473" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/288362226694377473" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2013  13:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Trump Invitational&#x27; at Mar-a-Lago was a huge success. Raised millions for charity and was the 1st equestrian event held in Palm Beach.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_288363404249427969" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/288363404249427969" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2013  13:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I hope the Republicans are happy. Just as I predicted</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_288366410017681409" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/288366410017681409" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2013  13:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Nominating Chuck Hagel for SOD is the wrong move for Obama. He doesn‚Äôt need the fight. Too much political capital will be wasted.&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_288366803749584896" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/288366803749584896" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2013  15:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Trade with China has killed over 29% of US manufacturing jobs in the US http://wapo.st/13dNkpL China is robbing us blind!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_288390473868013568" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/288390473868013568" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #997A2E" data-theme="trade" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2013  15:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;‚ÄúThe worst thing you can possibly do in a deal is seem desperate to make it.‚Äù - The Art of the Deal&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_288399000799944704" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/288399000799944704" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2013  15:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;‚ÄúWhat you dream about is what you will do. If you cannot even dream of doing big things</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_288401242852569088" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/288401242852569088" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 08, 2013  09:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ whitneykray @ IvankaTrump Great!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Jan 08, 2013  10:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Wow‚ÄîGolf Magazine just named Trump Scotland ‚Äúbest new course.‚Äù http://www.trumpgolfscotland.com/&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_288691356652675072" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/288691356652675072" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Katherine Webb and AJ McCarron. They are both winners!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_288722767975686145" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/288722767975686145" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 08, 2013  13:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We are going to ask Katherine Webb to be a judge at the Miss USA Pageant coming up in Las Vegas.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_288723024771956737" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/288723024771956737" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 08, 2013  13:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The fans are going to love the tasks in the upcoming 13th season of All Star @ CelebApprentice. Jan 08, 2013  14:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;‚ÄúI‚Äôve found I‚Äôm very good at two things: overcoming obstacles and motivating good people to do their best work.‚Äù - The Art of the Deal&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_288749150072340481" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/288749150072340481" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2013  10:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ Rosegalwines @ RNC Many people agree.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Jan 09, 2013  11:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I have accepted @ billmaher‚Äôs $5 million offer paid to me for charity (made on the @ jayleno show).&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_289068784944287744" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/289068784944287744" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2013  13:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Watch @ extratv&#x27;s spot covering the first annual Trump Invitational at Mar-a-Lagohttp://bit.ly/U2Yt8Y&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_289095939250085888" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/289095939250085888" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2013  14:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Apparently @ MartinBashir said something about me on his show yesterday. I was surprised to find out he is on TV. Who knew?!&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_289105215368609793" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/289105215368609793" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2013  14:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;It‚Äôs amazing that people can say such bad things about me but if I say bad things about them</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_289105330531618817" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/289105330531618817" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2013  15:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Hagel has been endorsed by China http://bit.ly/UFOaI8 &amp; Iran http://huff.to/V99uI7 for SOD. Welcome to Obama&#x27;s second term!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_289114333500289026" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/289114333500289026" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2013  15:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Chuck Hagel: Wrong For Defense&#x27; http://bit.ly/XiuZEX via @ NewYorkObserver&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_289114566087041025" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/289114566087041025" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2013  15:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;This is how it starts. Obama is now threatening to use an Executive Order for gun control http://bit.ly/10fegYs Welcome to his 2nd term.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_289116903987900416" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/289116903987900416" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2013  15:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Small bright spot in lackluster economy - travel industry added 81</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Jan 09, 2013  15:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Via @ eonline: &#x27;Donald Trump wants Katherine Webb for Miss USA judge&#x27;http://tinyurl.com/awcsrw6&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_289125985847234562" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/289125985847234562" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2013  15:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;He&#x27;s back! @ THEGaryBusey returns to cause even more trouble in the13th season of All Star @ CelebApprentice.&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_289126331453669376" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/289126331453669376" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2013  16:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;All successful people are high energy people who are passionate about what they do. Find a passion that energizes you.&#x27; - Think Big&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_289131808174514177" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/289131808174514177" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2013  16:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Experience is the teacher of all things.&#x27; - Julius Caesar&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_289137823976673280" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/289137823976673280" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; It&#x27;s as simple as that.&#x27; - Think Like a Billionaire&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_289455016983539712" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/289455016983539712" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2013  13:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Scary.
